LanguageData.HNGT_LocationInvalid: "Fire Control System Cannot Lock Onto This Area"
LanguageData.HNGT_InterMapBombardment_Desc: Launch a precise intercontinental ballistic attack on other targets across the planet.
LanguageData.HNGT_GlobalAttackArrived: {0} has arrived over {1}, entering terminal phase and beginning atmospheric re-entry.
